name: legal-plugins
description: Marketplace of legal reasoning and workflow plugins for Claude Code

plugins.name: legal-debate
plugins.description: Structured multi-agent debate for legal problem-solving (England & Wales / Commonwealth silk systems). King's Counsel argue a proposition for and against, or develop competing strategies, challenge each other like opposing counsel, and produce a weighted comparison with a reasoned verdict.

plugins.name: uk-legal
plugins.description: UK legal research MCP server (TypeScript) — case law, legislation, Parliament/Hansard, bills, votes, committees, OSCOLA citations, and HMRC guidance. Returns primary sources with citation metadata. Compliance-controlled reimplementation.

plugins.name: legal-research
plugins.description: Decision-tree guidance for grounding UK legal work in primary sources via the uk-legal MCP tools, with a mandatory citation-verification protocol that prevents fabricated authorities. Companion to the uk-legal plugin.
